description: Semantic boundary notes for bilingual phrases in Bitcoin inscription mirrors. These notes explain evaluation semantics and do not amend the on-chain originals.

boundaries.phrase: 验证此瑕疵。信任其故事。
boundaries.english_canonical: Verify the flaw. Trust the story.
boundaries.evaluation_reading: 先验证瑕疵，再自行决定如何阅读这个故事
boundaries.non_authoritative_english_paraphrase: Verify the flaw. Then decide how to read the story.
boundaries.unresolved_placeholder: [在此处插入包含所有证据（瑕疵照片、技术环境报告、沟通记录等）的、已上传至Arweave的单个数据包的最终交易哈希值]
boundaries.mirror_requirement: Preserve the on-chain wording and unresolved placeholder verbatim; place interpretation outside the quoted canonical text.
